query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `lead_activities` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `lead_id` int NOT NULL, `user_id` int, `type` enum('created','stage_changed','status_changed','note_added','whatsapp_sent','email_sent','invoice_generated','contract_generated','value_updated','score_updated','manual') NOT NULL, `description` text NOT NULL, `metadata` json, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `lead_activities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
